name: The Prism
depiction: A beam of light refracting through a prism
effect: Immediately draw a card of each other suit 🌈

name: Wheel of Fortune
depiction: A colorful spinning wheel divided into strange symbols
effect: All creatures in a 1 mile radius suffer from an effect from the wheel. Roll a d6 ||[[d6]]||: 1-Heal [[4d8]] HP and one level of exhaustion, 2-The next crop harvest will have double yields, 3-Grant inspiration, 4-Range of all attacks halved for the next minute, 5-Speed halved for the next minute, 6-Knocked prone) 🎡

name: Tightrope Walk
depiction: A tightrope stretched between two trees with a clown walking upside down under it
effect: For the next minute, all creatures within a mile are buffeted by strange gravitational waves. Creatures who move more than half their speed on their turn must pass a DC [[2d6+6]] Dexterity Save or fall prone 🎪

name: Stolen Voice
depiction: A disembodied mouth with a bead of energy emerging from it
effect: For the next 10 minutes, all creatures within a mile have their voices replaced with that of a random creature of the same type 🙊

name: Lost in the Woods
depiction: A confused person standing seemingly right side up on the underside of a dense forest canopy
effect: For the next hour, the surrounding terrain seems to shift and change when not being looked at. Mundane and magical sensors seem to shift randomly, and the sky seems to slowly spin around. Navigating within the affected area is impossible without a DC [[2d6+6]] Survival Check

name: Oldest Joke in the Book
depiction: As you gaze at the card, your mind reels, unable to truly comprehend what it sees. You look away quickly. Was that... a clown monster? A horrid jester? A trickster god?
effect: ||It was never truly asleep||||, but now it stirs... ||🤡

name: Magician's Wand
depiction: A archetypal magician's wand with a corny star on the tip
effect: For the next hour, whenever a spell is cast within a mile, there is a 50% chance it will cause a wild magic surge 🪄

name: Carnival of Lights
depiction: A fun-looking, but ghostly, carnival with colorful lights and strange music playing
effect: For the next hour, open space within a mile is filled by a spectral carnival. Creatures within the area must succeed on a DC [[2d6+6]] Wisdom Save or be charmed by the carnival, causing them to be distracted by the sights and sounds, giving disadvantage on Perception and Investigation checks. Any damage ends the effect for that creature 🎠

name: Lucky Coin
depiction: A coin on its edge
effect: For the next minute, all creatures within a mile gain advantage on Saving Throws 🪙

name: A Good Laugh
depiction: A disembodied laughing mouth
effect: For the next minute, creatures within a mile roll a d4 at the beginning of their turn. on a 1, they spend their turn incapacitated, laughing uncontrollably 😂

name: The Web
depiction: A giant spider web with a grinning face woven in the center
effect: For the next minute, spidersilk rains from the sky within a mile, creating difficult (and flammable) terrain outdoors. Creatures outdoors within the area who did not move last turn must succeed on a DC [[2d6+6]] Dexterity Save or be restrained by the webs. Affected creatures may retry the save as an action. 🕸️

name: Mask of Madness
depiction: A twisted version of Jorrick's mask, with a sinister grin
effect: For the next hour, creatures within a mile are affected by a strange madness. They must succeed on a DC [[2d6+6]] Wisdom Save or be frightened of all other creatures, and have disadvantage on all attacks and ability checks against them. Affected creatures may attempt to save as an action anytime they can't see another creature 😵

name: The Fool's Fortune
depiction: A hapless jester falling backwards into a pit of treasure
effect: For each creature within a mile, flip a coin. On a heads, they gain advantage on their next d20 test before the end of a long rest. On tails, they suffer disadvantage on their next d20 test before the end of a long rest 🎭

name: Double-Edged Sword
depiction: A sword with a double-edged blade that seems to shimmer and change color
effect: For the next minute, all creatures within a mile suffer from an ethereal weakness that gives a penalty of [[2d4]] to AC and Saving Throws ⚔️

name: Harlequin's Mirage
depiction: A dancing clown surrounded by flickering lights
effect: For 1 minute, illusions of harlequins fill the area within one mile, causing all creatures to suffer disadvantage on attack rolls 🎭

name: Whispering Wind
depiction: A swirling gust with tiny glowing whispers
effect: All sounds within a mile are baffled, causing disadvantage on Perception checks relying on sound for 30 minutes 🌬️

name: Luck’s Pendulum
depiction: A swinging pendulum with shifting symbols
effect: For 10 minutes, whenever a character makes a d20 test, flip a coin. On heads, they have advantage on the roll, and on a tails, disadvantage 🪙

name: Pandemonium Pulse
depiction: A swirling vortex of multicolored light
effect: Unleash chaotic energy in a 1-mile radius that causes all spells cast to have wild surges: roll on the Wild Magic Surge table for each spell cast in the area in the next minute 🌀

name: Mirror of Misstep
depiction: A man getting ready to stab a mirror as the mirror behind him gets ready to stab him
effect: For 10 minutes, all ranged attacks within one mile have their targets selected randomly among creatures in the radius, including the attacker’s own allies 🎯

name: Laughing Mask
depiction: A grinning theatrical mask radiating chaotic energy
effect: For 1 minute, all creatures within one mile are overcome with uncontrollable laughter, becoming incapacitated unless they succeed on a DC [[2d6+6]] Wisdom save 😂

name: Juggling Act
depiction: A jester juggling glowing orbs
effect: Each creature within a mile may reroll one s20 test they make within the next 10 minutes 🃏

name: Cacophony of Chaos
depiction: A horn blowing clouds of vibrant smoke
effect: For 10 minutes, all sound within one mile is distorted causing disadvantage on Perception checks relying on hearing and all verbal spell components have a 50% chance to fail 🔊

name: Chaos Bell
depiction: A cracked handbell emitting shimmering sparks
effect: Rings the bell to cause natural terrain in the 1-mile radius to randomly shift and change, creating difficult terrain zones for 10 minutes 🌪️

name: Broken Mirror Laugh
depiction: A shattered carnival mirror reflecting distorted faces
effect: For 10 minutes, creatures in the 1-mile radius hear indistinct laughter that imposes disadvantage on Perception checks and causes disadvantage on saving throws against being frightened 😈

name: Pandemonium
depiction: A chaotic explosion of multicolored lights in a swirling storm
effect: For 1 minute, creatures within a mile gain advantage on attack rolls and disadvantage on saves 🌪

name: Mask of the Merry Prankster
depiction: A porcelain mask with a mischievous smile
effect: Within 1 mile, all illusions and misleading effects are tripled in duration, range, or size, but all healing effects are halved for 10 minutes 🎭

name: Fool's Boon
depiction: A hand of playing cards sparkling with light
effect: For 10 minutes, all creatures within in 1 mile regain [[1d4+2]] hit points at the start of their turn 💫

name: Whimsy Wind
depiction: A swirling gust carrying multi-colored leaves and petals
effect: A chaotic wind affects a 1-mile radius for 1 minute, causing all ranged weapon attacks to have disadvantage and spells cast at a range over 30 feet to have a 50% chance to fail 🌬️

name: Clown’s Merriment
depiction: A clown’s oversized red nose glowing brightly
effect: For the next minute, characters wishing to speak or cast using verbal components must pass a DC [[2d6+6]] Wisdom save or laugh uncontrollably instead 🤡

name: Lucky Misfortune
depiction: A set of dice showing both ones and sixes
effect: For 1 hour, any creature within 1 mile that rolls a 1 on an attack or ability check can reroll it 🎲

name: Wild Card Chaos
depiction: A card exploding into sparks and colors
effect: All magitech malfunctions unpredictably for one minute within one mile—spells and magical effects have a 50% chance to cause a random wild magic surge ⚡

name: Harlequin's Prank
depiction: A laughing mask with shifting expressions
effect: Once pulled, illusions of harmless trickery appear randomly within 1 mile for the next minute 🤥

name: Clown's Blessing
depiction: A painted red nose glowing softly
effect: For 1 hour, all healing spells cast within one mile heal an additional [[1d8]] hit points and all damage dealt is reduced by [[1d6]] 🔴

name: Broken Compass
depiction: A cracked compass that spins erratically
effect: For 1 hour, all navigation attempts using magic or mundane means within one mile fail or lead to the wrong direction intended 🧭

name: Whisperwind’s Folly
depiction: A swirling breeze carrying faint laughter
effect: For 10 minutes, all sound within one mile is muffled and all spoken communication is replaced by unintelligible whispers, and perception checks relying on hearing gain disadvantage 🌬️

name: Fool’s Breath
depiction: A swirling gust of multicolored smoke
effect: Release a 1-mile radius Fog Cloud that lasts 10 minutes ☁️

name: Harlequin’s Mirror
depiction: A cracked hand mirror reflecting many faces
effect: For the next hour within one mile, illusions created by any source seem twice as real, causing all creatures have disadvantage on checks to discern lies or illusions 🪞

name: Thriller in the Night
depiction: A group of clowns performing an erratic dance
effect: Creatures in one mile must succeed on a DC [[14+d4]] Wisdom save or become charmed by the cardholder, compelled to mimic their movements for 1 minute 🤡

name: Clown’s Confetti
depiction: A burst of colorful confetti swirling in the air
effect: For 1 minute, creatures within 1 mile have disadvantage on attack rolls and advantage on spell saves as whimsical laughter disrupts focus 🤡

name: Chaos Bloom
depiction: A vibrant flower exploding with multicolored sparks
effect: Plants and fungi within one mile grow uncontrollably, doubling in size and spreading rapidly for 1 hour, making passage difficult but also providing abundant healing herbs 🌸

name: Fickle Breeze
depiction: A swirling wind carrying colorful leaves
effect: Within one mile, erratic gusts of unpredictable wind rage for the next ten minutes. All ranged attacks are made at disadvantage in the affected area🍃

name: Pandemonium's Whisper
depiction: A swirling vortex of chaotic colors
effect: For 10 minutes, magic within one mile has a 50% chance to produce a random wild magic surge effect whenever a spell is cast 🎲

name: Veil of Misdirection
depiction: A swirling fog of iridescent colors
effect: The area in a 1 mile radius is plagued with illusions for the next minute. All creatures in the area suffer disadvantage on Perception checks and ranged attacks for the duration🎭

name: Chaotic Pulse
depiction: A swirling vortex of multicolored light
effect: For 1 hour, all magic cast within one mile has a 50% chance to produce a wild magic surge effect determined by the DM at random ✨

name: Balancing Act
depiction: A tightrope stretched between two distant trees with a clown walking it
effect: For the next minute, creatures within one mile have their movement affected by wild gravity shifts, forcing them to succeed on DC [[2d6+6]] Dexterity saving throws to avoid falling prone when moving more than half their speed 🎪
